# Atelier Meruru: The Apprentice of Arland

name: Max Money On Buy + Sell + Gain
mode: once
w32 0020C240 60000000

name: Max Stats
mode: once
w32 00204DA4 409D01A0
w32 00204DB8 409D0180
w32 00204DCC 409D0160
w32 00204DE0 409D0140
w32 00204DF4 409D007C
w32 00204E04 60000000

name: AoB Max Money On Buy + Sell + Gain
mode: once
aob 409D0054916A0000806A00007C6918507C6307B4 60000000916A0000806A00007C6918507C6307B4

name: AoB Max Stats
mode: once
aob 811F0060837F004C2F9B03E7419D01A0 811F0060837F004C2F9B03E7409D01A0
aob 409D026C839F00502F9C03E7419D0180 409D026C839F00502F9C03E7409D0180
aob 409D026480DF00542F8603E7419D0160 409D026480DF00542F8603E7409D0160
aob 409D025C801F00582F8003E7419D0140 409D025C801F00582F8003E7409D0140
aob 409D0254801F005C2F8003E7419D007C 409D0254801F005C2F8003E7409D007C
aob 2F800000409D024C2F8803E7409D007C 2F800000409D024C2F8803E760000000
